'''Tyrannosaurs''' were a type of [[Dinosaur/Legends|dinosaur]]<ref name="Godking">{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack}}</ref> native to [[Togoria/Legends|Togoria]].<ref name="SM8" /> The [[eater]]s native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abonshee]] were similar to tyrannosaurs.<ref name="Godking" />

{{Creature-stub}}
